Like everything on Venice Beach, the skate park is totally overrated. It's dirty, it smells like marijuana, and homeless people are everywhere. You could look at a skate park in another big city and probably even have more of it than here on Venice Beach.

We encountered the Venice Skatepark as we strolled along the boardwalk in Venice Beach. There is some amazing talent doing incredible tricks on their skateboards. A crowd is usually here watching the action, and we stayed for 15-20 minutes to enjoy the scene. Beautiful setting right on the beach with the Pacific Ocean as a backdrop. Pretty iconic scene considering that Southern California beaches are the spiritual home of skateboarding.

Nice beachfront park, paradise for skaters.

Large and well maintained with ocean view 
Free of charge 
Easy parking
